---
name: ✨ Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement, needs-triage
assignees: ''
projects: []
---

## ✨ Feature Description

A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see.

## 🎯 Problem Statement

**Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.**

A clear and concise description of what the problem is. Ex. I'm always frustrated when [...]

## 💡 Proposed Solution

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## 🔄 Alternatives Considered

A clear description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## 📊 Use Case

Describe how this feature would be used:

1. User wants to...
2. Currently they have to...
3. With this feature they could...

## 🎨 Mockups/Examples

If applicable, add mockups, diagrams, or code examples:

```python
# Example API or usage
```

## 📈 Impact

| Area                | Impact |
|---------------------|--------|
| Performance         | Low/Medium/High |
| Security            | Low/Medium/High |
| Breaking Changes    | Yes/No |
| Documentation       | Required/Not Required |

## 🔧 Implementation Ideas

If you have ideas on how to implement this feature, share them here.

## 📋 Additional Context

- [ ] I'm willing to submit a PR for this feature
- [ ] This is a breaking change
- [ ] This requires documentation updates

Add any other context or screenshots about the feature request here.
